---
title: "Main Integrated Financial Report"
author: "Roan Campo, Denzel Macayan, Bea Uy, Miguel Uy"
date: "2026-07-01"
output:
  html_document: 
    theme: cerulean         # Try: flatly,lymen, journal, darkly, cosmo, or sandstone
    highlight: zenburn        # Try: kate, monochrome, espresso, zenburn, tango
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
    code_folding: hide      # Allows users to toggle code blocks visibility

---
To run, use the `knit` button shown above in the ribbon. The purpose of this `Main.rmd` is to atomize the sections to parts. This will create
You can run the child `.rmd` files in order in the same r session to get the output. Remember, for long outputs, you can hide them in RStudio.

```{r child-00-env-setup, echo=TRUE, child='00_env_setup.rmd'}
```

```{r child-01-data-acquisition, echo=TRUE, child='01_data_acquisition_cleaning.rmd'}
```

```{r child-02-data-integration-sql, echo=TRUE, child='02_data_integration_sql.rmd'}
```

```{r child-03-descriptive-stats-visualization, echo=TRUE, child='03_descriptive_stats_visualization.rmd'}
```

```{r child-06-financial-investigation, echo=TRUE, child='06_financial_investigation.rmd'}
```

```{r child-07-investment-allocation, echo=TRUE, child='07_investment_allocation.rmd'}
```
